Text.Page:
Take this report to Belok in Ceravin Point right away. If the argons are collaborating with Thulsa, he'll know what to do next.

Waste no time.
What news is there from our sister camp in the north?<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Ominous news from Cecera."</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Thulsa collaborating with argons? Cecera had warned of this.

The argons recently became fascinated with faerie magic, and even found a way to alter and use the modified energy. If they're working with Thulsa... can imagine what this means for the federation!

We must spread the news. Report all of this to Winstail in Valumnir Outpost.
Belok sent you? Let me guess, bad news?<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Is it ever anything else?"</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

This report can only mean one thing—the argons are more powerful than ever, and they're preparing to launch another attack. We must be ready.

At least they finally consider the federation army a dangerous foe. They must be truly afraid of their imminent defeat to be forming alliances.
